NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into by and between Dr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC: S2345678D), residing at 123 Orchard Lane, Singapore, and Siti Aishah binti Abdullah (NRIC: S3456789E), representing Aishah Holdings Pte Ltd (UEN: T12LL3456D), with its principal office at 456 Raffles Ave, Singapore. Contact number: +65 6234 5678; Email: s.aisyah@aishahholdings.sg.

1. Confidential Information. The parties agree to keep confidential all information disclosed by either party in relation to the software development project, excluding information that is publicly known or that was known to the receiving party prior to disclosure. This includes, but is not limited to, financial data, client lists, and technical specifications. The receiving party shall not disclose, publish, or disseminate any Confidential Information to third parties.

2. Non-Disclosure Obligations. Neither party shall disclose project status updates or the project plan details to any external parties without prior written consent. Any breach of this Agreement will result in liabilities and penalties as determined by the Singapore Arbitration Council. The SPA shall be governed by the laws of Singapore, and disputes shall be resolved under the rules of the Singapore International Arbitration Centre. All references to the SPA herein shall mean this Agreement.

For more information, please visit https://example.sg/user/S2 345678D.
